research_question: Does a provider-aware small-cap opening-gap continuation diagnostic produce a positive median next-session open-to-close return under frozen data-governance controls?
hypothesis: If future execution is authorized, events with prior close-to-open gap >= 10%, minimum price >= 2.00, minimum dollar volume >= 1000000, and market regime filter IWM close > EMA200 may show positive median next-session open-to-close return, subject to provider/tradability caveats.
